Class BrickDsl

java.lang.Object
ch.varani.bricks.ble.api.dsl.BrickDsl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class BrickDsl extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Entry point for the fluent BLE brick DSL.

Obtain a session with open() and chain DSL calls from there: 

try (BrickDsl dsl = BrickDsl.open()) {
    dsl.scan()
       .forLegoHubs()
       .first()
       .thenConnect()
       .asLego()
       .motor(0x00).startSpeed(80)
       .hubAction().switchOff()
       .done();
}

BrickDsl implements AutoCloseable so it may be used in a try-with-resources block. Closing the DSL stops any active scan and releases all underlying platform resources.

Thread safety: a BrickDsl instance is not thread-safe. Each thread that requires independent control of BLE hardware should create its own instance.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    close()
    Stops any active scan and releases all platform resources held by the underlying scanner.
    static @NonNull BrickDsl

    Creates a new BrickDsl session backed by the platform BLE stack.

    Returns the scan DSL builder for this session.

    Returns the underlying BleScanner for callers that need direct access to the raw API.

  • Method Details

    • open

      public static @NonNull BrickDsl open() throws BleException
      Creates a new BrickDsl session backed by the platform BLE stack.

      Internally calls BleScannerFactory.create() to obtain the platform-appropriate scanner. The caller is responsible for closing the returned instance (or using try-with-resources).

      Returns:
      a new BrickDsl session; never null
      Throws:
      BleException - if the platform BLE stack cannot be initialised

    • scan

      public @NonNull ScanDsl scan()
      Returns the scan DSL builder for this session.

      The returned ScanDsl wraps the scanner held by this session. Use it to start a passive or filtered scan and collect discovered devices.

      Returns:
      a new ScanDsl backed by this session's scanner; never null

    • scanner

      public @NonNull BleScanner scanner()
      Returns the underlying BleScanner for callers that need direct access to the raw API.
      Returns:
      the scanner; never null

    • close

      public void close() throws BleException
      Stops any active scan and releases all platform resources held by the underlying scanner.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Throws:
      BleException - if releasing resources fails
